task: Implement Countdown Prelaunch Page: middleware-based PRELAUNCH_MODE gate, Server Component fetching countdown_date from app_settings via service role, LED-style countdown timer (Days/Hours/Minutes), i18n vi/en, unit tests and E2E spec.
acceptanceCriteria: PRELAUNCH_MODE=true redirects all routes to /countdown without loop
countdown_date is fetched from app_settings table via service role
fallback date used when Supabase is unreachable
Days/Hours/Minutes displayed as 2-digit zero-padded LED blocks
timer updates every second via setInterval with cleanup
when countdown reaches 0, launched state is shown instead of redirect loop
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY never exposed to client bundle
all text uses next-intl i18n — no hardcoded strings
force-dynamic on CountdownPage prevents static rendering
unit tests pass for calcTimeLeft and CountdownDigitBlock
npm run build passes with 0 TypeScript errors
npm run lint passes with 0 errors
blastRadius: middleware.ts — prelaunch gate runs before auth guard, must not break /login flow
app_settings RLS — service role bypasses; key must stay server-side only
contracts: app_settings table has key=countdown_date with ISO 8601 timestamp value
PRELAUNCH_MODE env var controls redirect gate (string 'true' | anything else)
